title: Kantian Respect and the Transplant Case

interactions.text: A surgeon can save five patients by killing one healthy patient for organs.

interactions.prompt: Is the surgeon permitted to proceed?

interactions.text: Apply the requirement to treat persons as ends, not merely as means.
Kantian ethics emphasizes universalizable maxims and respect for persons.
Contrast the Kantian constraint with outcome maximization.

interactions.prompt: Would you revise your judgment or your principle to improve coherence?
